'''nolazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:waferless|waferless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waferless|waferless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nolazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolazhithi|nolazhithi]] || [[word:nolazhiji|nolazhiji]] || [[word:nolazhishi|nolazhishi]] || [[word:nolazhiki|nolazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolazhuthuthu|nolazhuthuthu]] || [[word:nolazhujuju|nolazhujuju]] || [[word:nolazhushushu|nolazhushushu]] || [[word:nolazhukuku|nolazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolazhuthu|nolazhuthu]] || [[word:nolazhuju|nolazhuju]] || [[word:nolazhushu|nolazhushu]] || [[word:nolazhuku|nolazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolazhufthuf|nolazhufthuf]] || [[word:nolazhufjuf|nolazhufjuf]] || [[word:nolazhufshuf|nolazhufshuf]] || [[word:nolazhufkuf|nolazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolazhethe|nolazhethe]] || [[word:nolazheje|nolazheje]] || [[word:nolazheshe|nolazheshe]] || [[word:nolazheke|nolazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolazhothotho|nolazhothotho]] || [[word:nolazhojojo|nolazhojojo]] || [[word:nolazhoshosho|nolazhoshosho]] || [[word:nolazhokoko|nolazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolazhotho|nolazhotho]] || [[word:nolazhojo|nolazhojo]] || [[word:nolazhosho|nolazhosho]] || [[word:nolazhoko|nolazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolazhofthof|nolazhofthof]] || [[word:nolazhofjof|nolazhofjof]] || [[word:nolazhofshof|nolazhofshof]] || [[word:nolazhofkof|nolazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfthĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfjĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfshĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfkĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfthĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfjĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfshĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfkĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfthĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfjĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfshĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolazhĂŻfkĂŻf|nolazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolazhĂŠthĂŠ|nolazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nolazhĂŠjĂŠ|nolazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nolazhĂŠshĂŠ|nolazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nolazhĂŠkĂŠ|nolazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolazhathatha|nolazhathatha]] || [[word:nolazhajaja|nolazhajaja]] || [[word:nolazhashasha|nolazhashasha]] || [[word:nolazhakaka|nolazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolazhatha|nolazhatha]] || [[word:nolazhaja|nolazhaja]] || [[word:nolazhasha|nolazhasha]] || [[word:nolazhaka|nolazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolazhafthaf|nolazhafthaf]] || [[word:nolazhafjaf|nolazhafjaf]] || [[word:nolazhafshaf|nolazhafshaf]] || [[word:nolazhafkaf|nolazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nolazhasha|nolazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolazhshĂ«sha|nolazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolazhrosha|nolazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolazhmusha|nolazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolazhyasha|nolazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolazhnkshĂ«sha|gonolazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolazhnkrosha|gonolazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolazhnkmusha|gonolazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolazhnkyasha|gonolazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nolalazhasha|nolalazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolalazhshĂ«sha|nolalazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolalazhrosha|nolalazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolalazhmusha|nolalazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolalazhyasha|nolalazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolalazhnkshĂ«sha|gonolalazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolalazhnkrosha|gonolalazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolalazhnkmusha|gonolalazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolalazhnkyasha|gonolalazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nelĂŠzhasha|nelĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nelĂŠzhshĂ«sha|nelĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nelĂŠzhrosha|nelĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nelĂŠzhmusha|nelĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nelĂŠzhyasha|nelĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonelĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gonelĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonelĂŠzhnkrosha|gonelĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonelĂŠzhnkmusha|gonelĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonelĂŠzhnkyasha|gonelĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nolfazhasha|nolfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolfazhshĂ«sha|nolfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolfazhrosha|nolfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolfazhmusha|nolfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolfazhyasha|nolfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolfazhnkshĂ«sha|gonolfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolfazhnkrosha|gonolfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolfazhnkmusha|gonolfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolfazhnkyasha|gonolfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
